allow: Bash(1 echo "Exit: $?" ls -la /tmp/vod-seek-test.mp4 echo "" echo "=== Probe the seek output ===" ffprobe -hide_banner /tmp/vod-seek-test.mp4)
Bash(1 echo "ffmpeg exit: $?" ls -la /tmp/proxy-test.mp4 echo "" echo "=== Server logs ===" tail -20 /tmp/tvproxy.log)

Bash(SESSION_ID="71065b32-1659-48f3-b224-3cd00b5f1828" echo "=== File from previous run still on disk ===" ls -la /tmp/tvproxy-vod/$SESSION_ID/video.mp4 echo "" echo "=== Server logs \(ffmpeg\) ===" grep -E "ffmpeg|vod|VOD|error|503" /tmp/tvproxy.log)
